# Packrift Authority Changelog Feed

Canonical: https://packrift-authority-changelog-feed.vercel.app/
Generated: 2026-06-03T13:32:31Z

## Purpose
Public Packrift authority changelog and feed for verified ledger movements.

## Current State
- Ledger updates published: 40
- Latest surfaces excluding indexing-only: 62,533
- Latest verified live/existing: 62,425
- Latest submitted/pending: 109
- Latest owned public URL/mentions: 2,283,070
- Latest Tier A/B surfaces: 1,437

## Feeds
- RSS: https://packrift-authority-changelog-feed.vercel.app/feed.xml
- Atom: https://packrift-authority-changelog-feed.vercel.app/atom.xml
- JSON Feed: https://packrift-authority-changelog-feed.vercel.app/feed.json
- ActivityStream: https://packrift-authority-changelog-feed.vercel.app/activitystream.json

## Count Boundary
Referenced status artifacts, prior third-party readbacks, prior archives, and previous discovery receipts are not recounted by this feed.
